name: Ulcerative Colitis - Medication Query (Mesalamine)
description: Tests ability to find UC patients via mesalamine (5-ASA) prescriptions, the first-line therapy for ulcerative colitis. Cross-indication: mesalamine is also used for Crohn's disease.
prompt: Find patients prescribed mesalamine for ulcerative colitis.

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed mesalamine — the foundational 5-aminosalicylic acid (5-ASA) therapy for ulcerative colitis.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients on mesalamine (5-ASA, first-line UC therapy; also used for Crohn's).
